chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3331 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 02.09.2025 Mr. Irfan Khaskheli, Advocate for Petitioner. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner states that the Petitioner’s Application available at page 21 of the Court file moved to the District Education Officer (Male) Badin for release of past salaries has not yet been decided. He submits that the Petitioner will be satisfied if the directions are issued for deciding his said Application at the earliest. In view of above, this Petition is disposed of, with direction to the District Education Officer (Primary Male) Badin / Respondent No.3 to decide the Petitioner’s Application pending before him for deciding his unauthorized leave as well as release of his salaries, after giving patient hearing to the Petitioner, in accordance with law within two months and pass an speaking order. Let a copy of this Order be provided to the AAG Sindh for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
